exhibits.title: [ SHIZUKA_AFTERIMAGE_01 ]
exhibits.description: Somewhere in the room, a small hesitation keeps returning, soft enough to miss and persistent enough to stay.

exhibits.title: [ BOOT_LOG_TXT ]
exhibits.description: Boot log from an orphaned terminal in monochrome mode.
exhibits.content:
> booting node-09
> loading archive index...
> serial link: established
> user: lain
> status: awake
> _ _ _
[END FRAME]

exhibits.title: [ TIMELINE_GRAVITY_A ]
exhibits.description: A slow, unnameable ache drifts through it, like a thought that never quite learns how to leave the door.

exhibits.title: [ TAPE_NODE_47 ]
exhibits.description: Monotone room tone and piano hiss captured from a rewound cassette.

exhibits.title: [ FIELD_NOTE_05 ]
exhibits.description: Handwritten field note reconstructed into plain text.
exhibits.content:
No shadows today.
Only outlines.
Only static.
Only the hum behind the monitor.

if this reaches you:
>> do not disconnect.
